Write Poitner

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x0
Size:
0x4

Description

Points to the next location the custom IP will write to. Valid range: 0 to 2047. Written by hardware, read by MicroBlaze.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:11] RESERVED rw 0x0 -
[10:0] WPTR r 0x0 WPTR

Field Descriptions

WPTR - WPTR

Write pointer index (word address, 0-2047)
